name: Cingulate Inc.
business: Cingulate Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company using its proprietary Precision Timed Release (PTR) drug delivery platform to develop next-generation pharmaceutical products for attention deficit/hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) and anxiety. Its most advanced product candidate, CTx-1301 (dexmethylphenidate), targets the ADHD treatment market and has been submitted for FDA approval. The company also has early-stage candidates CTx-1302 (dextroamphetamine) for ADHD and CTx-2103 (buspirone) for anxiety.
namedSuppliers: CoreRx, Inc., doing business as Bend Biosciences

exposures.sentence: We are a biopharmaceutical company using our proprietary Precision Timed Release TM ( PTR TM ) drug delivery platform technology to build and advance a pipeline of next-generation pharmaceutical products designed to improve the lives of patients suffering from frequently diagnosed conditions characterized by burdensome daily dosing regimens and suboptimal treatment outcomes.

catalysts.event: PDUFA target action date for CTx-1301 NDA
catalysts.sentence: The FDA accepted for review the NDA for CTx-1301 and assigned a PDUFA target action date of May 31, 2026.

tamClaims.claim: The US ADHD stimulant market has approximately 100 million annual prescriptions.
tamClaims.sentence: We are targeting the ADHD treatment market, with an estimated US market size of approximately 100 million annual prescriptions of stimulants, as of September 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Average branded long-acting stimulant WAC is $495 per prescription.
tamClaims.sentence: Furthermore, the average branded long-acting stimulant wholesale acquisition cost (WAC) is $495/Rx.

tamClaims.claim: A 1% market share would represent $250-300 million in annual revenue.
tamClaims.sentence: It is reasonable to assume that a 1% market share capture would represent approximately $250 to $300 million in annual revenue less rebates and discounts in this marketplace.

tamClaims.claim: Buspirone sales in the US exceeded $1 billion in 2025 within a $15.2 billion anxiety and depression market.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2025, United States sales of buspirone accounted for over $1 billion of sales in the $15.2 billion anxiety and depression market.
